camera settings, photography technology
ins_camera offers various white balance settings as part of its photography options.

CameraSDK-Cpp	Insta360
software development, camera control
Insta360 provides the CameraSDK-Cpp library to enable developers to control its cameras programmatically.

CameraSDK-Cpp	ONE X
compatibility, firmware requirements
The CameraSDK-Cpp supports the ONE X camera model, requiring specific firmware and USB mode settings.

CameraSDK-Cpp	ONE X2
compatibility, device control
The CameraSDK-Cpp supports the ONE X2 camera model, requiring specific USB mode settings.

CameraSDK-Cpp	X3
compatibility, device control
The CameraSDK-Cpp supports the X3 camera model, requiring specific USB mode settings.

CameraSDK-Cpp	X4
compatibility, device control
The CameraSDK-Cpp supports the X4 camera model, requiring specific USB mode settings.

CameraSDK-Cpp	Windows
platform support, software compatibility
The CameraSDK-Cpp is compatible with Windows platforms, requiring specific driver installations.

CameraSDK-Cpp	Linux
platform support, software compatibility
The CameraSDK-Cpp is compatible with Linux platforms, requiring specific driver installations like libusb.

Linux	libusb
driver dependency, system requirement
Linux systems require the libusb driver to detect and control Insta360 cameras via the CameraSDK-Cpp.

Windows	libusbK
driver dependency, system requirement
Windows systems require the libusbK driver to detect and control Insta360 cameras via the CameraSDK-Cpp.

ONE R Twin Edition	U-Disk Mode
configuration requirement, mode setting
This camera model requires specific U-Disk mode setting for SDK use.

CameraSDK-Cpp	DeviceDiscovery
core functionality, device management
Core class within the SDK for camera detection and enumeration.

libusbK	zadig
driver management, installation tool
Utility tool for installing required Windows drivers for camera connectivity.

apt-get	libusb
system configuration, package management
Package manager command for installing essential Linux drivers.

libusb	lsusb
system verification, troubleshooting
Diagnostic command to verify proper driver installation and camera detection.

CameraSDK-Cpp	USB Mode
configuration requirement, connectivity
Correct USB mode setting is mandatory for all SDK camera operations.

DeviceDescriptor	DeviceDiscovery
data retrieval, device management
The DeviceDiscovery class retrieves DeviceDescriptor objects containing camera connection information.

Camera	DeviceDescriptor
device connection, data utilization
The Camera class uses DeviceDescriptor to establish a connection with the camera.

Camera	X4
model-specific operations, compatibility
The Camera class interacts with the X4 model, requiring specific shooting modes for operations.

Camera	http://localhost:9099
media access, HTTP communication
The Camera class uses this URL to provide access to media files stored on the camera.

Camera	Preview Stream
video output, stream management
Camera class manages dual-fisheye preview stream output with resolution constraints.

Camera	TakePhoto
image capture, media generation
Camera executes photo capture operations returning accessible image URLs.

Camera	StartRecording
video capture, media creation
Camera handles video recording initiation with configurable capture parameters.

Camera	ExposureSettings
camera control, image quality
Camera applies exposure configurations separately for different function modes.

Camera	CaptureSettings
image processing, quality control
Camera implements image processing adjustments through capture settings.

MediaUrl	TakePhoto
media storage, URL generation
Photo capture operation produces MediaUrl instances containing image access paths.

MediaUrl	StartRecording
video storage, URL management
Recording operations generate MediaUrl objects with multiple video access paths.

CaptureSettings	ExposureSettings
camera configuration, quality adjustment
Both classes configure different aspects of camera capture behavior and output quality.

ins_camera::CaptureSettings	ins_camera::PhotographyOptions_WhiteBalance_WB_AUTO
software configuration, image quality
The CaptureSettings class uses the white balance setting to adjust the image quality.

ins_camera::CameraFunctionMode::FUNCTION_MODE_NORMAL_IMAGE	ins_camera::CaptureSettings
software functionality, image capture
The CaptureSettings class is applied in the normal image capture mode.

ins_camera::CameraFunctionMode::FUNCTION_MODE_NORMAL_VIDEO	ins_camera::CaptureSettings
software functionality, video capture
The CaptureSettings class is applied in the normal video capture mode.

Visual Studio 2015	g++
development environment, cross-platform compatibility
Both are development tools recommended for different operating systems to compile the camera software.

X4 HDR photos	ins_camera::CaptureSettings
photo output, software integration
The X4 HDR photos are likely produced using the settings configured in the CaptureSettings class.

ins_camera::CaptureSettings	std::make_shared
memory management, object creation
std::make_shared is used to create a shared pointer instance of CaptureSettings.

ins_camera::CaptureSettings	saturation
image configuration, parameter setting
CaptureSettings contains the saturation parameter set to 60.

ins_camera::CaptureSettings	white balance
color adjustment, automatic settings
CaptureSettings configures white balance to AUTO mode.

brightness	ins_camera::CaptureSettings
light control, image adjustment
CaptureSettings sets the brightness parameter to 30.

ins_camera::CaptureSettings	sharpness
edge definition, image clarity
CaptureSettings adjusts sharpness to level 4.

contrast	ins_camera::CaptureSettings
image dynamics, tonal range
CaptureSettings sets contrast to maximum (100).

cam.SetCaptureSettings	ins_camera::CameraFunctionMode
mode selection, function application
CameraFunctionMode defines the modes used when applying settings via SetCaptureSettings.

Visual Studio 2015	Windows
platform compatibility, development tools
Visual Studio 2015 is the recommended development environment on Windows.

Ubuntu	g++
platform compatibility, compilation tools
g++ is the recommended compiler for development on Ubuntu.

X4 HDR photos	machine integration
output processing, system integration
X4 HDR photo outputs are automatically processed within the machine.

MediaSDK	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
software component, media processing<SEP>software component, toolkit
stitcherSDKDemo.exe is part of the MediaSDK toolkit for media processing.<SEP>stitcherSDKDemo.exe is part of the MediaSDK, providing stitching functionality for media files.
data.file_path: MediaSDK Demo User Guide.md<SEP>MediaSDK Demo User Guide zh.md

data.content:
5.7K素材	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
media processing, high-resolution input
stitcherSDKDemo.exe processes 5.7K素材, which consist of two fisheye videos for stitching.

stitcherSDKDemo.exe	非5.7K素材
media processing, single-file input
stitcherSDKDemo.exe processes非5.7K素材, which contain two fisheye videos in a single file.

stitcherSDKDemo.exe	图片素材
media processing, image stitching
stitcherSDKDemo.exe processes图片素材, which are merged fisheye images for stitching.

stitcherSDKDemo.exe	视频输出
output generation, video encoding
stitcherSDKDemo.exe generates视频输出in mp4 format with customizable settings.

stitcherSDKDemo.exe	图片输出
output generation, image encoding
stitcherSDKDemo.exe generates图片输出in jpg or png format, including image sequences.

insta360 studio	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
software recommendation, media playback
stitcherSDKDemo.exe recommends insta360 studio for playing stitched panoramic media.

potplayer	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
software recommendation, media playback
stitcherSDKDemo.exe recommends potplayer for playing stitched panoramic media.

stitcherSDKDemo.exe	template拼接
algorithm implementation
Implements template-based algorithm as baseline stitching method.

dynamicstitch拼接	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
advanced feature
Offers dynamic stitching mode for quality-critical applications.

optflow拼接	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
premium feature
Provides optical flow method for premium quality output.

H.265编码	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
encoding optimization
Enables next-gen encoding when processing high-resolution outputs.

5.7K素材	非5.7K素材
input classification
Represent alternative input resolution tiers requiring different handling.

图片输出	视频输出
output modes
Complementary output modalities with distinct parameter configurations.

dynamicstitch拼接	template拼接
algorithm progression
Form quality/performance progression in stitching algorithms.

dynamicstitch拼接	optflow拼接
quality tiers
Represent increasing quality tiers in processing hierarchy.

H.264编码	H.265编码
encoding standards
Alternative encoding standards with different resolution capabilities.

CUDA	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
hardware acceleration<SEP>hardware acceleration, processing option
The tool can disable CUDA processing when needed.<SEP>Tool leverages CUDA acceleration when available for enhanced performance.
data.file_path: MediaSDK Demo User Guide.md<SEP>MediaSDK Demo User Guide zh.md

data.content:
insta360 studio	potplayer
playback options
Both serve as recommended playback solutions for stitched outputs.

Insta360	Panoramic Content
software functionality, media viewing
Insta360 provides software (Studio) specifically designed for viewing and editing panoramic content.

Panoramic Content	PotPlayer
media playback, configuration
PotPlayer can be configured to properly display panoramic content with the right settings.

Camera Accessory Type	Model File Path
parameter storage, file configuration
The camera accessory type parameter is likely stored or referenced in the model file path.

Enable Area Sample	Low-Resolution Export
image processing, quality control
The enable area sample parameter is specifically designed to address issues during low-resolution exports.

Enable Area Sample	Moiré Patterns
artifact removal, image optimization
The enable area sample parameter helps eliminate moiré patterns in exported images.

Note	Panoramic Content
user guidance, media playback
The note provides specific recommendations for viewing panoramic content.

Insta360 Studio	Panoramic Content
software functionality, media processing
Insta360 Studio is specifically designed software for viewing and editing panoramic content.

Low-Resolution Export	Moiré Patterns
image quality, technical limitation
Low-resolution exports are particularly susceptible to moiré pattern artifacts.

5.7K videos	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
video processing, input handling
stitcherSDKDemo.exe processes 5.7K videos by accepting paired '.insv' files.

Non-5.7K videos	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
video processing, input handling
stitcherSDKDemo.exe processes non-5.7K videos from a single '.insv' file.

H265 (HEVC)	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
video encoding, compression
stitcherSDKDemo.exe supports H265 encoding for high-resolution output.

H264	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
video encoding, default setting
stitcherSDKDemo.exe defaults to H264 encoding if H265 is not specified.

stitcherSDKDemo.exe	template stitching
stitching method, processing option
stitcherSDKDemo.exe offers template stitching as a basic panorama method.

dynamic stitching	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
stitching method, processing option
stitcherSDKDemo.exe offers dynamic stitching for higher quality panoramas.

optical flow stitching	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
stitching method, processing option
stitcherSDKDemo.exe offers optical flow stitching for the highest quality panoramas.

flowstate	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
stabilization, video enhancement
stitcherSDKDemo.exe includes flowstate for motion stabilization.

directionlock	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
playback control, stabilization
stitcherSDKDemo.exe includes directionlock for fixed viewing direction during playback.

stitch fusion	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
image quality, stitching enhancement
stitcherSDKDemo.exe includes stitch fusion to reduce chromatic aberrations.

denoise	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
image quality, noise reduction
stitcherSDKDemo.exe includes denoise to minimize grain and noise.

colorplus	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
color correction, image enhancement
stitcherSDKDemo.exe includes colorplus for enhanced color correction.

.insv files	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
file processing, input format
The tool processes .insv files as primary video input format.

.insp files	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
file processing, input format
The tool accepts .insp files as image input format.

.jpg files	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
file processing, image format
The tool supports .jpg files for both input and output.

.mp4 files	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
file processing, output format
The tool outputs processed videos in .mp4 format.

1920x960 resolution	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
video processing, output settings
The tool uses this as default output resolution with specific requirements.

moiré	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
image quality, artifact removal
The tool can eliminate moiré patterns using area sampling.

chromatic aberrations	stitcherSDKDemo.exe
image quality, color correction
The tool reduces chromatic aberrations through stitch fusion.

.insv files	5.7K videos
video format, camera output
5.7K videos are stored as pairs of .insv files from fisheye lenses.

.insv files	Non-5.7K videos
video format, camera output
Non-5.7K videos are stored as single .insv files combining both lenses.

.png files	image_sequence_dir
output format, frame export
Image sequences can be output as .png files when specified.

enable_area_sample	moiré
artifact removal, image processing
This feature specifically targets moiré pattern elimination.

chromatic aberrations	enable_stitchfusion
color correction, image quality
This feature specifically reduces chromatic aberrations.

Insta360's Studio	PotPlayer
software recommendation, panorama viewing
Both Insta360's Studio and PotPlayer are recommended for optimal viewing of panoramic content.

Colorplus Model	Enhanced Color Correction
feature dependency, parameter usage
Enhanced color correction features require specifying a model file path via '-colorplus_model'.

Area Sample	Moiré Elimination
image processing, artifact reduction
Area sample is used to eliminate moiré when exporting to low resolution.

Grain and noise	Reduction
image processing, quality enhancement
Reduction is used to minimize undesired grain and noise from the final output.

Colorplus_model	Enable_colorplus
feature dependency, parameter usage
Enable_colorplus requires specifying a model file path via '-colorplus_model' for enhanced color correction.

Enable_area_sample	Moiré
artifact removal, image optimization
Enable_area_sample is used to eliminate moiré when exporting to low resolution.

Insta360's Studio	Panoramic content
software functionality, media viewing
Insta360's Studio is recommended for optimal viewing of panoramic content.

Panoramic content	PotPlayer
media playback, panorama support
PotPlayer is recommended for optimal viewing of panoramic content.

MediaSDKDemo	libMediaSDK-dev
software verification, dependency<SEP>verification, dependency
MediaSDKDemo is used to verify the successful installation of libMediaSDK-dev.<SEP>MediaSDKDemo verifies the successful installation of libMediaSDK-dev.

Ubuntu	libMediaSDK-dev
software environment, compatibility
libMediaSDK-dev is installed and run on the Ubuntu 18.04 operating system.

MediaSDKDemo	g++
application building, compilation process<SEP>software development, compilation
MediaSDKDemo is compiled using the g++ compiler with Media SDK libraries.<SEP>MediaSDKDemo or modified example code can be compiled using the g++ compiler.
data.file_path: MediaSDK install Guide zh.md<SEP>MediaSDK install Guide.md

data.content:
cuda	libMediaSDK-dev
technical requirement, compatibility
cuda version 11.1 is noted as a requirement or relevant detail for libMediaSDK-dev.

dpkg	libMediaSDK-dev
package management, installation
libMediaSDK-dev is installed and managed using the dpkg package management tool.

MediaSDK	main.cc
compilation, linking
main.cc is compiled by linking against the MediaSDK library.

g++ 7.5.0	main.cc
compilation, toolchain
g++ 7.5.0 is used to compile the main.cc source file.

Ubuntu 18.04	libMediaSDK-dev
platform compatibility, targeting
libMediaSDK-dev is specifically packaged for Ubuntu 18.04.

CUDA 11.1	libMediaSDK-dev
dependency, hardware acceleration
CUDA 11.1 is noted as a version requirement for libMediaSDK-dev.

C++11	main.cc
language standard, compatibility
The main.cc file is compiled using the C++11 language standard.

main.cc	testSDKDemo
build process, output
testSDKDemo is the output executable generated from compiling main.cc.

Media SDK	Ubuntu 18.04
software compatibility, system environment
The Media SDK is installed and run on the Ubuntu 18.04 operating system.

Media SDK	MediaSDKDemo
verification tool, debugging
MediaSDKDemo is used to verify the successful installation and functionality of the Media SDK.

CUDA	Media SDK
dependency, compatibility
The Media SDK may rely on CUDA version 11.1 for certain functionalities, as indicated in the notes.

Media SDK	g++
compilation, development tool
The g++ compiler version 7.5.0 is used to compile the MediaSDKDemo for the Media SDK.

Media SDK	dpkg
package management, installation method
Media SDK is distributed as a Debian package and installed using dpkg.

Media SDK	main.cc
sample code, development example
main.cc is an example source file that demonstrates Media SDK usage.

CUDA 11.1	Media SDK
hardware acceleration, dependency
Media SDK requires CUDA 11.1 for GPU-accelerated media processing.

example directory	main.cc
file location, sample organization
main.cc source file is located in the example directory of Media SDK.

Insta360	MediaSDK-Cpp
software integration, hardware compatibility
MediaSDK-Cpp is designed to handle media from Insta360 cameras.

MediaSDK-Cpp	Windows
platform support, software compatibility
MediaSDK-Cpp supports Windows as a platform for media stitching.

Linux	MediaSDK-Cpp
platform support, software compatibility
MediaSDK-Cpp supports Linux, particularly Ubuntu, for media stitching.

Linux	Ubuntu
operating system, software testing
Ubuntu is the primary Linux distribution tested for MediaSDK-Cpp compatibility.

MediaSDK-Cpp	Video Stitcher
software component, functionality
The Video Stitcher is a key component of MediaSDK-Cpp for processing videos.

Image Stitcher	MediaSDK-Cpp
software component, functionality
The Image Stitcher is a key component of MediaSDK-Cpp for processing images.

CUDA	MediaSDK-Cpp
performance optimization, hardware acceleration
MediaSDK-Cpp partially supports CUDA on Ubuntu and fully on Windows for enhanced performance.

MediaSDK-Cpp	insv
file format support
